title: 焦らずにいきましょう

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me... Cheer up, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But they were counting on me, and I wasn't able
to follow through...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, yes... kind of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Nishino Flower was asked to
embroider a floral design onto a handkerchief as
a gift for her friend's mother.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I used the wrong color, but I only realized it after
I had already started embroidering...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... What do I do? My friend asks me for help, and I end up ruining everything...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There, there, it's okay. I've got an idea.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If we add a pattern using the color you
accidentally used, it'll make a nice background
for the actual flower...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wow! This looks great!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Creek! You really are
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're always so calm and kind—not to mention
knowledgeable about all sorts of things...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I still have a long way to go if I ever want to catch up to you...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wish I was as calm, dependable, and wonderful
an Umamusume as you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, I'm sure you'll be far more amazing than me
when you grow up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not true! I mean... I'm still...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, then I'll just have to prove it to you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who grew those flowers over
there, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I love flowers too, but I don't know very much
about them.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Raising things is very difficult. Simply liking them
isn't enough to make them grow.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
One needs knowledge, patience, and a kind
heart—all of which you have, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Creek...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And you'll become even more wonderful from
here on out. There's no need to rush.
choice_data_list:
For now, you still have time to let yourself get
coddled.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
See? Even someone who helps Umamusume grow
for a living says so.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't rush. Take your time becoming the
Umamusume you want to be, okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Just like how you grow flowers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Right! I won't rush. I'll take my time... growing
myself!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's encouragement makes Nishino
Flower break into a smile reminiscent of a
blooming bud.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I feel like Super Creek might end up coddling
me a bit too much...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, how about we test that out? Starting...
with... a... squeeeeeze! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is surprised by Super Creek's hug,
but smiles happily nonetheless.
